name: webai
description: Scaffold and upload React or Vue apps to the webAI Apogee shell

commands.name: new-app
commands.description: Scaffold a new React or Vue app for the webAI Apogee shell

commands.name: build-upload
commands.description: Build the current app to a single HTML file and inject the upload script

commands.description: Add OasisHost AI inference wiring to an existing webAI app

commands.description: Add CollaborationManager wiring to an existing webAI app
